docket_entries.description: MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR FEB-07-2005 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR COURT ON FEB-07-2005 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 206 JURY DEMAND ORDERED STRICKEN BY COMMISSIONER SUE KAPLAN FOR NON APPEARANCE OF DEFENDANT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ON 2/2/05.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-02-2005 Continued To Feb-07-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-07-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as re-assigned by the Master Calendar Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
David Mendez, Esq. for Plaintiff: Park Hotel, LLC
No appearance by the Defendant: Keith Clarkson.
Plaintiff's witness: Franck Souty, was sworn and direct examined.
Exh. 1 - Three day Notice----------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant(s): Keith Clarkson as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 325 Sutter St., #407, San Francisco.
Lease agreement is forfeited.
Rent and Per Diem Damages of $941.72
No Attorney's Fees.
Costs $183.30
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibit in open court.
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-07-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-02-2005 Off Calendar
